docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY ZHANG, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT FANG, YOUG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
